name: SIM - Simple Idle Miner
short_description: Gather resources to help the "important persons" to escape from the planet. A small and simple clicker game. Some would call it an idler. But how idle can you get, clicking all these upgrades. Also the fox doesn't want you to idle. Go get to work!
detailed_description:
A small and simple clicker.


  • Mine resources, improve the mines, buy upgrades, improve the upgrades
  • Earn XP, activate NG+ for even more bonus production
  • play EndlessMode and let the numbers grow even higher
  • Choose your challenge, the integrated Simple Idle Mods can be activated and combined as desired

Help Ferdinand Fuchs and the other “important people” to escape.
Spoiler alert: He won't be grateful for this.
Rather, he will regularly hit you with sayings that range from amusing to borderline offensive.


Ferdinand also loves dressing up.
And in every costume he comes with new sayings.



Some more details:

- 45 achievements wait to get unlocked
- "BestPlayed" with mouse, but if you really want to, controllers are supported for the core gameplay.

Playtime
- Vanilla: 4-5 hours
- AllAchievements: +1-2 hours
-> + EndlessMode; + Mods = X hours extra.
